name: skill-cycle-stepper
description: Create SkillCycleStepper component - horizontal stepper showing the 6 skill phases (discovery, analysis, classification, design, spec, implementation) with current phase highlighted.
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts currentStatus prop matching FeatureSession.status values
Renders 6 steps horizontally: discovery, analysis, classification, design, spec, implementation
Current step is visually highlighted (different background/border)
Completed steps show checkmark or filled indicator
Clicking a step calls optional onStepClick(status) callback for navigation
Uses tailwind classes and cn() utility for styling
Responsive - stacks vertically on mobile if needed
